cover_letter:
Dear Anthropic Hiring Team,

The line in your job description emphasizing "iterating fast on real user feedback" immediately resonated with my approach to building developer tools. My five years of experience have been dedicated to creating intuitive, high-impact software that directly improves engineering workflows, and I am excited by the opportunity to contribute to Claude Code.

My background includes extensive work on terminal applications and a strong belief in excellent developer UX. As lead developer at DataPath Inc., I built an internal CLI toolkit in Python with Click, which reduced average debug-investigation time for over 200 engineers from 45 minutes to 12 minutes. Further demonstrating this, my open-source CLI tool, qlog, has garnered 1,800 GitHub stars, and my senior project involved developing a terminal-based static site generator.

I am comfortable working with LLMs at the API layer, having recently built cover-letter-bot, a Streamlit app using the OpenAI API, specifically to learn these patterns. While I have light exposure to the Anthropic API, I am adept at rapidly learning new technologies. My strong proficiency in Python and TypeScript, cultivated over five years, has been key to designing and shipping features like a developer-onboarding portal in TypeScript/Next.js and a React/Node.js dashboard that served 8,000 daily active users, improving page load from 3.2s to 800ms.

I am eager to bring my passion for developer experience, my skills in Python and TypeScript, and my experience with terminal applications and LLM APIs to Anthropic. I am confident I can make immediate contributions to the Claude Code team and would welcome the chance to discuss this further.

Sincerely,
Alex Chen
job_description:
Software Engineer — Anthropic, San Francisco

We're hiring a software engineer to help build Claude Code, our
terminal-based AI coding assistant.

You'll:
- Design and ship features in TypeScript and Python
- Work directly with model researchers to shape model capabilities
- Iterate fast on real user feedback

We're looking for:
- 3+ years building production software
- Strong opinions about developer tools and UX
- Comfort working with LLMs at the API layer
- Bonus: experience with terminal applications, Node.js, or React

cover_letter:
Dear Anthropic Hiring Team,

The description of Claude Code as a "terminal-based AI coding assistant" and your emphasis on having "Strong opinions about developer tools and UX" deeply resonates with my professional philosophy. I believe excellent developer tools should seamlessly integrate and ultimately disappear into the workflow, a principle I've applied across my 5 years in software development.

My experience directly aligns with designing and shipping features in both TypeScript and Python. At DataPath Inc., I was the lead developer on an internal Python CLI toolkit, which reduced average debug-investigation time for 200+ engineers from 45 minutes to 12 minutes. I also designed and shipped a TypeScript/Next.js developer-onboarding portal, cutting new-hire ramp time from six to three weeks. My open-source Python CLI tool, qlog, further demonstrates my ability to build user-centric terminal applications, a skill I also cultivated through my senior project: a terminal-based static site generator.

Regarding comfort working with LLMs at the API layer, my side project, cover-letter-bot, utilized the OpenAI API to draft content, allowing me to learn practical LLM API patterns. This direct, hands-on experience, coupled with my general exposure to Anthropic's tools, would enable me to quickly contribute to shaping Claude Code's capabilities. My background building React/Node.js dashboards also aligns with your desired bonus experience.

Sincerely,
Alex Chen
